name: 阿德里亚娜·莫比乌斯
name_full: 阿德里亚娜·莫比乌斯 Adriana Möbius
introduction: Film and theatre actress in France and Germany, is born 1991 in Quito-Ecuador. She grew up and lived in South-America, Germany and France. Learning as a child both Spanish and German. From her early years on she follows her parents steps into dancing and theater.2011 to 2014 she attends the international theatre school "Cours Florent" in Paris-France. From her second year on she starts out in German TV-Series like "Gute Zeiten, schlechte Zeiten" or "Sesame Street" as well as on Paris' theatre stages and international short movies.From 2014 on she confounded and acted in the french theatre group "La Compagnie des Lueurs".
